productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Casual White Black Stripe Shoe
description: Composition:The shoe has a rubber sole and upper made of leather and synthetic materialShoe care:Use a soft clean, damp cloth to wipe away dust. Do not machine washFitting:Regular These stylish numero uno sneakers in white with bold black highlights and stitch detailing is the perfect casual wear. The white lacing and the contoured shape give your feet ample support. Team these sneakers with your casuals the next time you go out for a movie with friends or want to hang out at the mall.
